name: Stashy Repo
subtitle: Repository for the Stashy iOS app
description: An unofficial AltStore/Feather compatible source for Stashy — a native iOS client for your self-hosted Stash instance.

apps.name: Stashy
apps.subtitle: Stash iOS Client
apps.localizedDescription: Native iOS client for your self-hosted Stash instance. Browse your scene library, stream video with HLS, view performers and tags — all with a fast, themeable Liquid Glass UI.
